case_title: WORTHAM FAMILY PARTNERSHIP vs. ROGER, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROGER, JAMES
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT ROGER, JAMES

DEPT 8, JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT MILLER, CSR BRENDA FILEDS CLERK, EMONTI 2:45 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF COUNSEL, JEFFREY MARGUILES PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION WAS READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR R&P OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 455 HYDE ST #82. DEFT TO VACATE BY 3-1-94, NOON. DEFT TO PAY $3400.00 PER MO AT $100.00 PER MONTH STARTING JULY 1994, PAYABLE TO WORTHAM FAMILY & DE- LIVERED TO JOE BRAVO OFFICE BY THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, THEN ADDITIONAL MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $1000. NO FURTHER STAYS. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. NO OTHER OCCU- PANTS RESIDE AT PROPERTY. DEFT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY DAMAGE BEYOND NORMAL WEAR & TEAR. AGENT TO MEET DEFT AT PROPERTY AT NOON ON 3-1-94 TO SURRENDER KEYS. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $550. TO BE RETURNED TO THE DEFT.
